Location: 5:23 - 9:2
Root: pipe(\n  Effect.succeed(1),\n  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),\n  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))\n)

      ==> [subject] -> [1]

      ~> [call] -> [2]

      ==> [pipe] -> [4]
